action.reasoning: Observation: iter_20 trained Ridge on 5M samples, estimated val mean_r2=0.285 with threshold=0 (no override). This is higher than current best 0.2445. Analysis: Using more training data improved the linear model's generalization, allowing us to drop the humidity override and get positive contribution from those dimensions. Submitting eval will confirm test performance. Decision: submit eval with the new linear model and threshold=0 config.
